body.u: I left school at 15 more than 45 years ago. After having a few jobs for experience I started training with a vet to become an animal nurse.
I was happy as an animal nurse and was one for a year before I married my husband.
After we married we brought a small flat in Cornwall and started saving hard for a cottage.

My husband was in the army and so I didn’t see much of him, and lived alone in the flat. As I was alone so much I started taking some animal (that were unwanted) home and soon it was like a farm. After three years in the army (one year was spent in theirthere before he knew me).
My husband came out and we brought the cottage we had been saving for.
I left work soon after that as I became pregnant, and my husband was earning a good wage.
I had a baby boy, then a girl then another boy. After they started school. I worked again at a home for stray cats and dogs.
I stayed theirthere for ten years then the owners decided to move abroad so we broughtbought it off of them.
Now at the age of 60 my husband and I have made our youngest son who has helped out for years manager he is in charge of it all, while my husband and I start relaxing a bit.
